Mobile Barriers


       Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.       
Physician Protection Mobile Screen

A unique new design that allows unparalleled protection for close-to-table studies. Sturdy, yet thoughtfully engineered with a small “Footprint” so it can easily be positioned exactly where you want it for maximum scatter radiation protection.
Mobile X-ray screen designed to protect operating physicians.

  • Screen height adjustable by 11.8”. Includes safety catch to set in desired position
  • 0.50 mm LE double protective curtain
  • Horizontal position can be adjusted to fit close to table.
  • Four sturdy casters, two locking casters.
  • Powder coated steel frame.
  • Order with or without 9" x 24" Stainless Steel Instrument Tray.
  • Modular parts can be easily replaced, including the lead acrylic if needed.


    • Dimensions: 57.5” W x 69.7” W. Screen height adjustable by 11.8”, includes safety catch to set in desired position.
    Glass Size: 45.7" W x 18.7" H
    Glass Pb LE Equiv.: 2.0mm
    Curtain: Revolution Gray
    Frame Colors: White, Gray, Black or Upgrade to custom color.
    Frame Material: Powder Coated Steel or Upgrade to Stainless Steel.
    Wheels: 4 Swivel Casters, 2 with Brakes.

    Crated Ship Weight: 160#, 48" x 40" x 12".

 Technologist Protection X-ray Mobile Screen

This window can be easily raised and lowered by hand as a result of the perfectly counter-balanced internal springs. The high quality steel construction and stainless springs provide a lifetime of trouble-free use.
Mobile X-ray screen designed to protect technical personnel from X-ray radiation.

  • Retractable Window.
  • Multiple Height Options.
  • Perfectly Counter Balanced, easy to raise and lower.
  • 1.50mm Pb equivalent base.
  • 0.50mm Pb equivalent lead acrylic window.


    • Size Raised: 74.4” H x 29.9” W
    Size Lowered: 46.5” H x 29.9”
    Glass Size: 37.4” H x 27.6”
    Glass Pb LE: 2.0mm
    Frame Color Options: White, Gray, Black or Upgrade with a custom color.
    Frame Material: Powder Coated Steel or Upgrade to Stainless Steel.
    Wheels: 4 Swivel, in include Brakes.

    Crated Ship Weight: 170#. 32" x 52" x 14".

Large Window Mobile Barrier
Powder coated steel frames, precision TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.0mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barriers made with complete head to toe protection. 4 Hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Frame shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~See color/frame part number below.

Tilted Mobile Barrier with or without Reach Through Curtain

  • Powder coated steel frame
  • Precision TIG welded for years of trouble-free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety
  • 2 locking casters
  • 1.5 mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in “Sintra” plastic for easy cleaning and durability
  • Modular parts can be easily replaced, including the glass if needed.


    • Dimensions: 70” H x 34” W X 25” L
    Glass Size: 24” H x 30” W
    Glass Options: Lead: 2.0 mm Pb LE, Acrylic: .50 mm Pb LE
    (Optional) Curtain Size: 20” H x 30” W

    Frame Colors: White, Grey, or Black. * Custom colors available.

    Ships in standard white unless specified.

    Frame Options: Powder Coated Steel, Stainless Steel (Upgrade)
    Floor Curtain Color: Revolution Grey, Custom colors available.
    Wheels: 4 swivel casters, 2 with brakes

 MEDIUM Window Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, precision TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability. 2.0mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drapes, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 Hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Frame shown in white ~ Available in Gray Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

Standard Mobile Barrier

This is Infab's most popular mobile protective barrier. Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Frame shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.


Lead Glass Barrier Weight (uncrated): 135 lbs.
Shipping Weight (crated): 325 lbs

 Small Window Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Frame shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

Extra Tall Mobile Barrier
Powder coated steel frames, precision TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.0mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barriers made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Frame shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

 "Shorty" Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Frame shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

"Wide" Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

 "Extra Wide" Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

Regular Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.

 "Mid Tall" Mobile Barrier

Powder coated steel frames, TIG welded for years of trouble free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety. 2.00mm lead equivalent optically clear lead glass encased in clear Lexan to prevent shattering. 1.5mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in "Sintra" plastic for easy cleaning and durability. Exclusive 1.5mm lead equivalent floor drape, the only barrier made with complete head to toe protection. 4 hospital grade casters, two with locks for ease of movement and positive positioning.

Window now available in lighter weight Lead Acrylic with protection of 0.50mm.

Shown in white ~ Available in Metal Gray and Matte Black.
7 Custom colors as well~fee applies.
